race.description: Dubbo City & Gilgandra Toyota Dubbo Gold Cup Day Sunday 28 Sept Hcp (C1)
race.comment: Big field with plenty of chances. TROPIC (2) well bred gelding with just the one win from seven starts. In need of the run when resuming with a fading last over 1200m at Warren. Tricky gate and leading country jockey hops aboard. Deserves another chance. KEVIN (3) lightly raced gelding resuming on his home track. Showed ability early in the campaign last year and keep safe with the claim. RING MY BELL (11) can hold a forward position again and should be close to her top third-up. Stuck on well with a game third over 1100m at Scone. Top-three contender from the inside draw. SON OF EUREKA (5) resumes with a host of gear changes and the latest trial placing had merit. Leading player from the draw.
